stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Using the significant weather chart indicated, regarding the jet stream located to the north-west of Norway, what is the significance of the number "480?" written underneath the jet "150/480?"?

options.a: This is the upper boundary of the jet stream expressed as a flight level.
options.b: This is the maximum speed in knots attained in the jet core.
options.c: This is the local temperature in Kelvin at the height of the jet stream core.
options.d: This is the upper limit of the associated Clear Air Turbulence area expressed as a flight level.
